en: Now it is superfluous for me to write to you about the ministry for the saints,
zh: 關於供應聖徒的事，我本來沒有寫信給你們的必要，

en: for I know your readiness, of which I boast about you to the people of Macedonia, saying that Achaia has been ready since last year. And your zeal has stirred up most of them.
zh: 因為我知道你們有這個心願。我對馬其頓人稱讚你們，說：“亞該亞人去年已經預備好了。”你們的熱心就激勵了許多的人。

en: But I am sending the brothers so that our boasting about you may not prove vain in this matter, so that you may be ready, as I said you would be.
zh: 我派了那幾位弟兄前來，為了要使我們在這事上對你們的稱讚不至落空，好讓你們可以照著我所說的準備妥當，

en: Otherwise, if some Macedonians come with me and find that you are not ready, we would be humiliated- to say nothing of you- for being so confident.
zh: 免得一旦馬其頓人和我一同來到的時候，見你們還沒有準備好，我們就因為這樣信任你們而感到羞愧，你們就更不用說了。

en: So I thought it necessary to urge the brothers to go on ahead to you and arrange in advance for the gift you have promised, so that it may be ready as a willing gift, not as an exaction.
zh: 因此，我認為必須勸那幾位弟兄先到你們那裡去，使你們事先籌足從前所答應的捐款。那麼，你們這樣的準備，就是出於樂意的，不是勉強的。

en: The point is this: whoever sows sparingly will also reap sparingly, and whoever sows bountifully will also reap bountifully.
zh: 還有，少種的少收，多種的多收。

en: Each one must give as he has made up his mind, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver.
zh: 各人要照著心裡所決定的捐輸，不要為難，不必勉強，因為捐得樂意的人，是 神所喜愛的。

en: And God is able to make all grace abound to you, so that having all sufficiency in all things at all times, you may abound in every good work.
zh: 神能把各樣的恩惠多多地加給你們，使你們凡事常常充足，多作各樣的善事。

en: As it is written, "He has distributed freely, he has given to the poor; his righteousness endures forever."
zh: 如經上所說： “他廣施錢財，賙濟窮人； 他的仁義，存到永遠。”

en: He who supplies seed to the sower and bread for food will supply and multiply your seed for sowing and increase the harvest of your righteousness.
zh: 但那賜種子給撒種的，又賜食物給人吃的 神，必定把種子加倍地供給你們，也必增添你們的義果。

en: You will be enriched in every way for all your generosity, which through us will produce thanksgiving to God.
zh: 你們既然凡事富裕，就可以慷慨地捐輸，使眾人藉著我們，對 神生出感謝的心。

en: For the ministry of this service is not only supplying the needs of the saints, but is also overflowing in many thanksgivings to God.
zh: 因為這供應的事，不僅補足了聖徒的缺乏，也使許多人對 神感謝的心格外增多。

en: By their approval of this service, they will glorify God because of your submission flowing from your confession of the gospel of Christ, and the generosity of your contribution for them and for all others,
zh: 眾聖徒因為你們承認和服從了基督的福音，並且慷慨地捐輸給他們和眾人，藉著你們在這供應的事上所得的憑據，就把榮耀歸給 神。

en: while they long for you and pray for you, because of the surpassing grace of God upon you.
zh: 因著 神在你們身上的厚恩，他們就為你們禱告，切切地想念你們。

en: Thanks be to God for his inexpressible gift!
zh: 感謝 神，他的恩賜難以形容。
